app.title: Professional AutoML Dashboard
app.subtitle: Upload dataset, train, analyze, predict and export.

projects.searchPlaceholder: Search by project or dataset name
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This removes the run from the database and deletes uploaded CSV, model, report, plots, and related generated files. This cannot be undone.
projects.deleteFailed: Could not delete the project. Please try again.
projects.addToProjectsMessage: Show this training run on your Projects page? You can add it later from the run dashboard.
projects.notOnProjectsListBanner: This run is not listed on Projects yet. Use the button to show it alongside your saved projects.
projects.emptyHint: After a training run finishes, choose "Yes, save it" to show it here, or add runs later from their dashboard.

runDetails.streamlitWait: This run is not completed yet. Wait for training to finish.
runDetails.copyUrlSuccess: URL copied. Paste it into Chrome or Edge.

landing.heroSubtitle: Upload datasets, run guided AutoML, and deploy insights with a polished workflow.
landing.aboutText: We build practical machine learning tools for teams that need speed, clarity, and reliability.
